title: The Shining of Being (The Essence of Meditation Series)
author: Rupert Spira
description: Infinite being shines as the amness of yourself and the isness of all things. The Shining of Being is an invitation to return to your true nature - the intimate, familiar presence that shines in your mind as the knowledge 'I am'. With poetic clarity, Rupert Spira guides you to the still, silent core
